g.text: Why 3.65k: I_FS*R must fit the 3V3 - 0.5V(BIASx) headroom.
Provision EEPROM to VREF=VDD + code 0xFFF; FPGA programs a known code before enabling.
FPGA must program a known DAC code before enabling current.
Off by default: MCP4728 powers up at full-scale code -> VOUT=VDD -> PMOS OFF -> 0 uA.
BIAS1: off by default via MCP4728 POR code (VOUT=VDD -> Q41 OFF).
Deck backup topology: PMOS drain drives BIASx directly via the off-sheet 1x2 jumper.
FPGA must program a known DAC code before enabling current.
BIAS BLOCK - POR FAIL-SAFE (MCP4728 POR code; no isolation FET)
BIAS0: off by default via MCP4728 POR code (VOUT=VDD -> Q40 OFF).
